"""
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM542_REAL_INTERNAL_ORCHESTRATOR_TEST_ROADMAP.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem542')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

files = {
  'curator_contract': Path('governance/internal_contour/curator_intake_contract.md'),
  'role_orchestrator': Path('.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml'),
  'provider_adapter': Path('.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml'),
  'claude': Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml'),
  'transport': Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'),
  'role_state': Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json'),
  'provider_state': Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json'),
  'contour_status': Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
}

checks = {}
for k,p in files.items():
    txt = p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
    low = txt.lower()
    checks[k] = {
      'path': str(p),
      'exists': p.exists(),
      'bytes': len(txt),
      'workflow_dispatch': 'workflow_dispatch' in low,
      'schedule': 'schedule:' in low,
      'transport': 'results.jsonl' in low,
      'state': 'role_cycle_state.json' in low or 'provider_contour_state.json' in low,
      'claude': 'claude' in low,
      'gpt': 'gpt' in low,
      'failover': 'failover' in low or 'reserve' in low or 'selected_provider' in low
    }

# Determine real gaps.
role_orchestrator_text = files['role_orchestrator'].read_text(errors='ignore') if files['role_orchestrator'].exists() else ''
provider_text = files['provider_adapter'].read_text(errors='ignore') if files['provider_adapter'].exists() else ''

role_has_decision_logic = all(x in role_orchestrator_text for x in ['next_role', 'role_cycle_state.json', 'results.jsonl'])
provider_has_failover_logic = all(x in provider_text for x in ['selected_provider', 'reserve_signals', 'provider_contour_state.json'])

roadmap.write_text('# BEM-542 | Real Internal Orchestrator Test Roadmap\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:12 (UTC+3)\n\n## Причина\nBEM-540 был synthetic test. Он не доказал, что реальный внутренний оркестратор сам читает вход, выбирает роль и ведёт цикл.\n\n## Цель\nПроверить рабочую модель системы на практике: задача входит через curator intake, затем internal role-orchestrator принимает решение о следующей роли, provider-adapter выбирает провайдера, executor создаёт artifact, auditor/curator закрывают цикл.\n\n## Архитектурная граница\nВнешний контур не должен напрямую управлять ролями. Но тест должен проверять внутреннюю orchestration logic, а не ручную эмуляцию ролей.\n\n## Roadmap\n\n### BEM-542.1 — Orchestrator readiness and gap audit\nПроверить, что role-orchestrator.yml и provider-adapter.yml имеют реальную decision/failover logic, а не только append records.\nPASS: report with exact gaps.\n\n### BEM-542.2 — Implement real orchestrator test harness\nДобавить internal test harness, который читает curator intake and transport, применяет те же routing rules, что role-orchestrator, и пишет решения как internal orchestrator records. Если возможно — улучшить role-orchestrator contract/workflow.\nPASS: orchestrator_decision artifact produced from input, not hardcoded role chain.\n\n### BEM-542.3 — Provider probe and adapter decision\nПеред reserve-switch выполнить provider probe decision: Claude active -> Claude selected; Claude failed -> GPT reserve.\nPASS: provider_selection_decision records for both branches.\n\n### BEM-542.4 — End-to-end practical test\nЗапустить тестовую задачу через curator intake, orchestrator decision, provider adapter, executor artifact, final closure.\nPASS: transport/state/report show role decisions created by orchestrator logic.\n\n### BEM-542.5 — Final system report\nСформировать honest PASS/BLOCKER: что реально работает, что остаётся runtime-limited.\n')

report = reports/'bem542_real_orchestrator_preflight.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-542.1 | Real Orchestrator Preflight | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:12 (UTC+3)\n\n## Вывод\nПредыдущий BEM-540 не является реальным тестом оркестратора. BEM-542 запускает проверку practical model.\n\n## Checks\n```json\n' + json.dumps(checks, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Gap assessment\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| role_orchestrator_decision_logic | ' + str(role_has_decision_logic) + ' | Search in `.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml` |\n| provider_failover_logic | ' + str(provider_has_failover_logic) + ' | Search in `.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml` |\n| BEM-540 realism | Synthetic, not practical orchestrator test | Roles were written by one executor script |\n\n## Blocker\nnull for preflight. Realism must be tested in BEM-542.2-BEM-542.5.\n')
proof = proofs/'bem542_real_orchestrator_preflight.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-542.1 PASS: real orchestrator preflight completed; BEM-540 synthetic limitation acknowledged.\n')

changed_files.extend([str(roadmap), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-542.1 real orchestrator preflight and roadmap created')
